title: Overview Widget - Column Widths. Timeline field some include year some dont

posts.author: iruser (iruser)
posts.cookedHtml:
overview widget shows some of my board dates with the year and some without. The ones that have the year are not wide enough.

I guess why do some boards include the date and some dont?

It appears you cannot adjust the width of the columns within the widget (making the widget wider adjusts the first column only.

Can someone confirm you cannot adjust these column widths?

posts.author: abuislam (abuislam)
posts.cookedHtml: It seems column widths in the overview widget cannot be adjusted manually. The year display might depend on the date format settings of each board.
